title: An Act establishing an amendment to Bridgewater Town Charter: Article IV, Section 4-1 Town Manager term of office

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Gallagher of Bridgewater, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5545) of Dennis C. Gallagher (with the approval of the town council) relative to the town Manager term of office in the charter of the city known as the town of Bridgewater.  Municipalities and Regional Government.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

related_entities.name: the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government
committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/22/2026 from 10:00 AM-12:00 PM in A-1
